caption: The video captures a Russian aircraft, identifiable by the "Россия" (Russia) text on its side, taxiing on a runway. The plane is a twin-engine jet with a distinctive purple and white livery. In the background, there are two helicopters, one of which appears to be a military or transport model, possibly a Mil Mi-26, given its large size and rotor configuration. The setting seems to be an airfield or airport, with grassy areas surrounding the runway and some industrial structures visible in the distance. The sky is overcast, suggesting cloudy weather conditions. The scene conveys a sense of activity and preparation, likely for a flight or a demonstration involving both the aircraft and the helicopters.
